description: §21.2 Form 1 — an `export <Card title:string>` whose outer attribute name (`title`) also appears on the body root (`<div title="x">`) fires E-EXPORT-003. The outer and body-root attribute sets must not collide (other than `class`, which merges).
rationale: §21.2 Form 1 desugars by splicing the outer attrs into the body-root opener; a same-named attr on both sides is ambiguous. `title` on both the `<Card>` outer and the `<div>` body root is rejected E-EXPORT-003 (choose one location).
